featured.author: Mike T.
featured.text: Best tire shop I've ever been to. They matched the exact fitment for my lifted F-150 and the price was better than anywhere else.

featured.author: Sarah K.
featured.text: Super helpful staff. They took the time to explain the differences between tire options and helped me pick the right ones for Michigan winters.

featured.author: James R.
featured.text: Got a full wheel and tire package for my Silverado. Installation was quick and everything looks amazing. Highly recommend!

featured.author: Linda M.
featured.text: Great selection and fair prices. The team was knowledgeable and got me in and out quickly.

featured.author: David H.
featured.text: These guys know trucks. They set me up with the perfect offset for my RAM and it looks incredible. No rubbing, perfect stance.

featured.author: Jennifer P.
featured.text: Finally found a shop that doesn't talk down to women. They answered all my questions and helped me understand what I was buying.

featured.author: Chris B.
featured.text: Ordered wheels online, picked up at the Pontiac location. Seamless experience and the guys helped me load them up.

featured.author: Amanda W.
featured.text: Good prices and honest service. They told me my tires still had life left instead of pushing a sale. I'll be back when I actually need new ones.
